context.graph.goal: An agroecological diagnostic platform that enables field technicians to assess farm sustainability through a structured questionnaire covering soil, water, biodiversity, management, socioeconomic, and resilience dimensions. The app is offline-first, territory-agnostic with extension support, multi-language (English and Spanish), and generates PDF reports with radar chart visualizations.
